datapacks.name: Purple House
datapacks.notes: Staged vanilla build datapack for Minecraft Java 26.1.2. Use exterior + interior functions for deterministic house placement at your current coordinates.
datapacks.notes_1: Functions are in namespace `purple_house` with duplicate `function`/`functions` paths for compatibility: `/function purple_house:exterior` then `/function purple_house:interior` (or `/function purple_house:complete`).
datapacks.notes_2: Includes an `/function purple_house:erase` cleanup helper. No worldgen random-spread placement data is included in this package.
